QC-INF Thread-Safe Repositories
QC-054.01 SingletonThreadPool Connection Factory
Engine uses SingletonThreadPool and factory returns same conn on same thread
Factory returns different conn on different thread with busy_timeout
QC-054.02 Repo Worker Thread Access
Worker and main threads can read each other's writes
QC-054.03 Concurrent Repo Access Stress Test
MCP worker thread and UI main thread can access repos concurrently
QC-054.04 MCP asyncio.to_thread Integration
_execute_tool runs safely via asyncio.to_thread for reads and writes
QC-054.05 Pool Cleanup on Project Close
Project close disposes engine and clears connection_factory
